docs.title: MikuAPI
docs.text:
Fast. Simple. Built from scratch.

MikuAPI adalah lightweight ASGI web framework untuk membangun API modern dengan Python.

docs.title: Login
docs.text:
from mikuapi.security.jwt import encode

@app.post("/login") def login(username: str): return {"token": encode({"user": username})}

docs.title: Protected
docs.text:
from mikuapi.security.auth import require_user from mikuapi import Depends

@app.get("/me") def me(user=Depends(require_user)): return user

docs.title: CLI
docs.text: mikuapi run main:app mikuapi run main:app --reload mikuapi version mikuapi info

docs.title: Dependency Injection
docs.text:
from mikuapi import Depends

def get_user(): return {"name": "miku"}

@app.get("/me") def me(user=Depends(get_user)): return user

docs.title: Create App
docs.text:
from mikuapi import MikuAPI

app = MikuAPI()

@app.get("/") def home(): return {"msg": "Hello"}

docs.title: Rate Limiting
docs.text:
from mikuapi.limiter import limit

@app.get("/limited") @limit(3, window=5) def limited(): return {"msg": "rate limit active"}

docs.title: Validation
docs.text:
from mikuapi.schema import BaseModel

class User(BaseModel): name: str age: int

@app.post("/user") def create_user(user: User): return user.dict()
